The '''Old Research Facility''', also known as '''Old Republic Facility''', was a research facility on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. Originating from the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. It was rumoured to be inhabited by strange creatures and aggressive guard [[Droid/Legends|droids]].

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the droid known as [[HK-47]] transferred itself to this facility, and employed an individual to activate the facility's power, and then travel to the [[Neimoidian droid factory|droid factory]] and re-activate it.

{{Struct-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Old Research Facility appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:ORF" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Old Research Facility was added to the game with the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan|''Trials of Obi-Wan'']] on [[November 1]], [[2005]].<ref name="SWG:ORF" />
